pinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ yòng shǒujī App jiǎofèi.
english: You can pay fees using your phone's app.

sentence: 她买了一件橙色的外套。
pinyin: Tā mǎi le yī jiàn chéngsè de wàitào.

sentence: 交响乐团今晚在大剧院演出。
pinyin: Jiāoxiǎng yuètuán jīn wǎn zài dà jùyuàn yǎnchū.
english: The symphony orchestra is performing at the grand theatre tonight.

sentence: 消防员迅速赶到现场扑灭了火灾。
pinyin: Xiāofángyuán xùnsù gǎndào xiànchǎng pūmiè le huǒzāi.
english: Firefighters quickly arrived at the scene and put out the fire.

sentence: 这道题要求计算合格率的百分比。
pinyin: Zhè dào tí yāoqiú jìsuàn hégélǜ de bǎifēnbǐ.
english: This question asks you to calculate the percentage of the pass rate.
